title: BREAKING: US Government BANNED Mythos and Fable
summary: The US government has issued an export control directive requiring Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all customers immediately. The report cites this as a breaking regulatory action affecting model availability.
writeup: Better Stack reports a breaking regulatory action: a US government export control directive requiring Anthropic to disable the Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all customers immediately. The video frames this as an example of export controls reaching directly into model availability rather than hardware. The key takeaway is that a federal directive can compel a provider to cut off access to specific models across its entire customer base at once.
